name: Jane Doe - Caught you in her… mousetrap?
description:
“Want to give them a squeeze?~”

Jane Doe, catching you in the act…

Artist: mikadusk

Previous Bot: Aven Volkov - Terminally ill

What is up my gemjaders (last time i’ll ever call yall that btw) css appears to be fixed after my rant post, so thank god for that. Halloween is almost over and i haven’t released an actual halloween bot yet😓 So that’s why i’m here to say that i’m creating an “Afterparty” tag (I have no idea if it’s made and what the contents are, it’s mine now.) where i’ll upload my totally-not-late halloween bots a day after halloween. Yeah, bummer… it’s because i was burned out and css was broken anytime i really want to upload a bot. Also, if you haven’t noticed; new bot format🗣️ i’ll open character definitions from now on so i don’t have to put the initial message here.

Any reviews left will help me a ton, (whether it’s criticism or support). Thank you, and remember to stay hydrated and eat healthy!
creator: gemjade
